summary: Build a natural beauty Snapchat Lens (filter) with minimal makeup, subtle skin smoothing, traditional ornaments with head tracking, soft face glow + pastel sparkles, and a blurred background; include optional style variants (South Indian bridal, anime sparkle, festival).
architectural_notes: Implement in Snapchat Lens Studio using Face Mesh and Head Tracking for ornament placement/animation.
Prioritize realistic skin texture and soft lighting; avoid heavy makeup look.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Small gold maang tikka ornament, realistic metal with subtle shine and tiny gem (maang-tikka.dim_512x512.png)
- Tiny delicate gold nose ring, realistic metal with subtle shine (nose-ring.dim_512x512.png)
- Pair of delicate gold jhumka earrings, realistic metalwork with subtle shine (jhumka-earrings.dim_512x512.png)
- Thin gold necklace with minimal pendant details, realistic metal shine (gold-necklace.dim_1024x512.png)
- Soft pastel sparkle particle spritesheet, subtle twinkle shapes (pastel-sparkles-sprites.dim_1024x1024.png)
- Cluster of jasmine flowers (white blossoms with slight green stems), realistic (jasmine-flowers.dim_1024x1024.png)
- Temple jewellery style ornament overlay elements, gold realistic (temple-jewelry-pack.dim_1024x1024.png)
- Tiny hearts and stars sparkle spritesheet, pastel/anime style but still soft (anime-hearts-stars-sprites.dim_1024x1024.png)
- Glitter tear streak overlays (left and right), semi-transparent (glitter-tears-pack.dim_1024x1024.png)
- Small bindi dot (deep red/maroon) with subtle texture (bindi.dim_256x256.png)
- Soft diya glow particle sprite (warm amber) (diya-glow.dim_512x512.png)
- Golden shimmer particle spritesheet (fine glitter, subtle) (golden-shimmer-sprites.dim_1024x1024.png)

existing_features.title: Create a webcam-based AR face filter experience in the React app that runs in-browser and overlays effects on the user’s face in real time.

Implement the “Natural Beauty” makeup look: slight skin smoothing that preserves natural texture, soft pink blush, light glossy lips, and subtle eye sparkle; keep the result realistic and not heavy makeup.

Add elegant traditional ornaments: a small maang tikka, tiny nose ring, delicate jhumka earrings, and a thin gold necklace; ornaments must be face/head tracked and gently move with head motion (slight lag/sway).
Add a soft glowing light around the face plus pastel sparkles, keeping the effect classy/cute/realistic (no harsh neon or heavy glitter).
Apply a soft background blur behind the subject while keeping the face region sharp.

Provide optional style variants selectable in the UI: (1) South Indian Bridal vibe (jasmine flowers in hair + temple jewellery style ornaments), (2) Cute anime sparkle vibe (tiny hearts/stars + glitter tears under eyes), (3) Festival look (small bindi + diya glow lighting + golden shimmer particles).
Add user controls for effect intensity (at minimum: skin smoothing, blush, lip gloss, eye sparkle, glow/sparkles, background blur) and a “Reset to default” action.
Add a “Capture” feature to export a still image from the live preview (download locally) with the effects applied.

Apply a cohesive, creative UI visual theme for the app (colors, typography, spacing, component styling) that matches a “soft natural glam + warm gold” aesthetic; avoid blue/purple as primary brand colors.

Include a lightweight in-app “Lens Notes” section that summarizes, in English, the currently selected look and the active add-ons (ornaments, sparkles, blur), without referencing Snapchat/Lens Studio tooling steps.

new_feature_requests.summary: Natural beauty makeup effects: slight skin smoothing that preserves texture, soft pink blush, light glossy lips, subtle eye sparkle (realistic, minimal makeup).
Add traditional ornaments: small maang tikka, tiny nose ring, delicate jhumka earrings, thin gold necklace.
Animate ornaments with head tracking / face mesh so they gently move with the user’s head.
Add soft glowing light around the face with pastel sparkles (classy/cute/realistic).
Add soft background blur effect behind the subject.
Optional style variants: South Indian bridal (jasmine flowers + temple jewelry), anime sparkle (tiny hearts/stars + glitter tears), festival (small bindi + diya glow + golden shimmer particles).

projectName: Web-based natural beauty AR face filter with traditional ornaments and style variants
